ocr_findings.description: 問題1-20 answer choices layout: image shows a 2×2 grid (ア/イ on top row, ウ/エ on bottom row). OCR renders them as a flat list (ア, イ, ウ, エ on separate lines). No text loss — cosmetic format difference.

reviewer_notes: Mixed page: three exam questions (問題1-18, 1-19, 1-20) in upper half, answer line '問題1-18 イ 問題1-19 エ 問題1-20 ア' captured, then 解答・解説 section for 解答1-11. Answer letters fully present — no answer_line_loss. The explanation prose (ABC分析) is accurately reproduced. Page correctly classified as exam due to dominant question format.
